frameworks.name: reward prediction error
frameworks.one_line: Learning signal driving updates of outcome expectations

frameworks.name: belief state
frameworks.one_line: Probabilities over latent states weight prediction errors under perceptual uncertainty

frameworks.name: pupil-linked arousal
frameworks.one_line: Arousal systems indexed by pupil regulate learning rate

core_question: Does pupil-linked arousal encode belief-state-weighted prediction errors during reward learning under perceptual uncertainty?
key_assumptions: Belief states modulate learning from prediction errors under ambiguity
Pupil responses index arousal systems regulating learning
Reward prediction errors drive updating of outcome expectations
key_findings: Pupil responses to outcomes scaled with prediction errors
Pupil responses were down-weighted under higher perceptual uncertainty
interpretations: Arousal systems integrate perceptual and reward information to regulate learning dynamically
Prediction errors are weighted by belief state during learning under uncertainty
